Container.Name: ClaudeClaw
Container.Overview: ClaudeClaw — multi-agent AI personal assistant. Telegram bots for 7 agents (Main, Comms, Content, Ops, Research, Coach, Webster) plus War Room voice interface. Dashboard at port 3141.

Config.Name: AppData / Store
Config.Description: SQLite database and PID lock — must persist across restarts

Config.Name: Claude Config
Config.Description: Claude Code credentials dir. Run `claude setup-token` inside the container to populate.

Config.Name: Env File
Config.Description: Full .env secrets file — copy from your laptop's project root

Config.Name: WhatsApp Auth
Config.Description: WhatsApp session — persists QR auth across restarts

Config.Name: Claude OAuth Token
Config.Description: Long-lived Claude Code subscription token. Generate inside the container: docker exec -it ClaudeClaw /app/node_modules/@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk-linux-x64/claude setup-token. Recommended for personal/home use (covered by Claude Max subscription).

Config.Name: Anthropic API Key
Config.Description: sk-ant-api03-... API key. Alternative to OAuth token — bills per token against your API account. Use this if you don't have a Claude Max subscription or want stable metered billing.

Config.Name: Claude Code Path Override
Config.Description: Leave blank. Only set if the SDK's bundled binary fails to auto-detect. Example: /app/node_modules/@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk-linux-x64/claude
